zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Alice Malpas於1388年6月17日出生在英國爾馬爾帕斯時，她的父親David De Malpas48歲，母親Katherine Bickerton27歲。她於1405年與John Bird在英國英格蘭爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1437年5月10日在英國諾福爾可沃爾辛厄姆 艾比享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Alice Malpas于1388年6月17日出生在英国爾馬爾帕斯时，她的父亲David De Malpas48岁，母亲Katherine Bickerton27岁。她于1405年与John Bird在英国英格兰爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1437年5月10日在英国諾福爾可沃爾辛厄姆 艾比享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Malpas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Malpass
meanings: English (Staffordshire and Gloucestershire): habitational name, chiefly from either of two places called Malpas (Cheshire, England and Monmouthshire, Wales); perhaps also occasionally from other minor places so called in England (e.g. in Berkshire, Cornwall, and Yorkshire) or from various places called Malpas or Maupas in France. The placenames derive from Old French mal ‘bad’ + pas ‘passage’.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Alice Malpas was born on 17 June 1388, in Malpas, Cheshire, England, her father, David De Malpas, was 48 and her mother, Katherine Bickerton, was 27. She married John Bird in 1405, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 10 May 1437, in Walsingham Abbey, Norfolk, England, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Alice Malpas est née le 17 juin 1388, à Malpas, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, David De Malpas, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Katherine Bickerton, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé John Bird en 1405, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 mai 1437, à Walsingham Abbey, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Alice Malpas am 17. Juni 1388 in Malpas, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater David De Malpas 48 und ihre Mutter Katherine Bickerton 27. Sie hat 1405 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom John Bird geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. Mai 1437 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Walsingham Abbey, Norfolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Alice Malpas è nata il il 17 giugno 1388 nel Malpas, Cheshire, England, sua padre, David De Malpas, aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Katherine Bickerton, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato John Bird nel 1405, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 10 maggio 1437, nel Walsingham Abbey, Norfolk, England, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Alice Malpasが1388年6月17日にイギリスチェシュアイアマルプアスで生まれた時，父David De Malpasは48歳，母Katherine Bickertonは27歳であった。1405年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアでJohn Birdと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1437年5月10日にイギリスノーフォルクワルシンガム アビーで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Alice Malpas(이)가 1388년 6월 17일 영국 체실르 맬파스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 David De Malpas(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Bickerton(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1405년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 John Bird(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1437년 5월 10일 영국 노르폴크 월징함 애브브이에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Alice Malpas nasceu em 17 de junho de 1388, em Malpas, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, David De Malpas, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Bickerton, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com John Bird em 1405, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 10 de maio de 1437, em Walsingham Abbey, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Alice Malpas родилась 17 июня 1388 г. в местности малпас, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени David De Malpas было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Bickerton, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Bird в 1405 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 10 мая 1437 г. в местности валсингхам эбби, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 48 лет.

Se casó con John Bird en 1405, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 10 de mayo de 1437, en Walsingham Abbey, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 48 años.
